summaries.summary: The flowchart shows a computer and connected nodes reflect common computer accessories and peripherals

state.boardState: Single flowchart on the board, fully expanded, no active annotations

narrative.overview: A flowchart that expresses the peripherals that a computer usually has.
narrative.purpose: Used in University of Calgary Lecture 1 of Introduction to Computer Organisation to introduce computer systems from the User's perspective
narrative.dialogue: The instructor is explaining what a personal computer could use

walkthrough.narration: So there was the personal computer, this box is the main c
We can attach it to screen, that allows us to display information
We connect a keyboard to the computer that allows us to send inputs into the computer
Same thing with a mouse or a keypad
And we probably might have a speaker
